blocks.content: Shirone headed to the section with new magic books and looked through the advanced difficulty shelf.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Alright. I've decided on this one.
Books with titles like 'Time Lock Using Quantum Transformation' and 'Magic Circle Interference Based on Wave Principles' were lined up, just reading the titles made him feel overwhelmed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Pass. Pass. Pass on that one too.
Shirone stopped in front of a book on the last shelf.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hmm, what's this?
It was similar in thickness to the other books and wasn't about information magic. But what caught his attention was the title.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Laser...
The white cover indicated it was a photonic magic book, but it had a red band to signify the laser aspect.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let's take a look.
The name of the developer under the title was Louis Jacquebain.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ah, Jacquebain...
When he opened the book, it was filled with complex formulas.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is amazing.
It was a fusion magic combining two principles of photonic magic.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is what Flu meant. Magic that complements weaknesses and creates synergy.
A Photon Cannon with mass could be given a spin to achieve some degree of curvature.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But if I master Laser Guidance Technology...
He could hit the target no matter where it moved.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Great! This will be my first fusion magic!
Shirone took the magic book and looked for Flu.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes, here. Two books.
Flu alternated between the two books and nodded.

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: Alright. They seem to complement each other well. Let's tell Ms. Isabel and borrow them.
When they brought the books to Isabel, she issued a loan certificate.

blocks.speaker: Isabel
blocks.content: This one is quite difficult. Are you sure?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes. I already know how to use lasers. Is it that hard?
The laser Shirone used was different from other mages.

blocks.speaker: Isabel
blocks.content: It's a specialized field not covered in school. Especially since it uses radio waves, it might be unfamiliar.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'll give it a try. I want to master lasers this time.
If he was determined, Isabel had no reason to stop him.

blocks.speaker: Isabel
blocks.content: Well, using photons as attack magic is rare, so I understand your ambition. If you have any questions while studying, ask me. The Chairman instructed me to tutor you if necessary.
Gaold's consideration was both appreciated and daunting.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Thank you. I'll probably be back soon.

blocks.speaker: Isabel
blocks.content: Haha! Sure. Come anytime.
To avoid feeling embarrassed later, Shirone gave a heads-up and got on the elevator.
The iron door of the library closed before the elevator did.
As always, it felt like returning from another dimension.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: With Flu's help, Shirone got a personal training room. Strictly speaking, it was Gaold's order.
It wasn't as spacious as the underground bunker, but it was enough for him to unleash the Spirit Zone and train alone.
A sleep capsule was installed in the corner, and the floor material was the same as the 2000 training ground.
The simulation device seemed capable of analyzing magic from various angles.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hmm, it seems both easy and tricky.
The key was the speed of linking passive and active magic.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let's give it a try.
Entering the training ground, Shirone cast the photonic transformation magic.
With a familiar sensation, the scenery ahead warped and rushed towards him.
Arriving 10 meters ahead, Shirone looked at the ceiling, lost in thought.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Oh, I see.
When teleportation is activated, the slot is empty.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Does the slot need to switch much faster?
In that case, Shirone had a specialty to boast about: parallel processing.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Focusing on that, Shirone attempted Scatter Movement based on parallel processing.
By sunset, he was getting the hang of it.
After recovering his mental strength for an hour in the sleep capsule, he executed the magic with maximum concentration.
Finally, he shot light in eight directions simultaneously with teleportation.
Moving north, the basic route of Scatter Movement, Shirone looked back, unable to hide his excitement.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I did it! I did it!

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: What did you do?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What else? Scatter Movement, of course.
Flu walked into the training ground.

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: Do it again. I'll evaluate it.
Flu's firm tone made Shirone a bit nervous.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Okay. I'll start with the basic route...

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: No need. Do the intermediate course. Go to any of the eight directions you want.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let's go southeast.
While Shirone focused, Flu waited with her arms crossed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Scatter Movement!
As Shirone's body glowed golden, light exploded in all directions.
Arriving exactly 10 meters southeast, he clenched his fist.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Success, it's a success.
His joy was short-lived as he flinched in surprise.
Flu was already in front of him, holding his shoulders with both hands.
Her eyes were half-closed, calm like when she subdued a terrorist.

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: Uh, um...

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: Do you know what your problem is now?
In form, Scatter Movement was a success. But Flu had pinpointed him among the eight flashes.

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: Is the linking too slow?
Flu finally let go of his shoulders.

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: Yes. It's not visible, but it can be sensed in the Spirit Zone. Especially for a manipulation-type mage like me, the delay is even more apparent.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But I did my best.

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: It's not about effort. Your linking was excellent. You probably switched at a speed close to parallel processing...

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: But that's the problem.
Shirone tilted his head.

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: Parallel processing is a thought method that rapidly switches two slots. While thoughts can slow down, there's no faster switching.

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: To explain your mechanism: you equip teleportation, cast it, unequip teleportation, then equip photon output and cast it.
Flu demonstrated by putting her fists in and out, representing the linking of the two magics.

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: Going through at least three steps created a delay perceptible in the Spirit Zone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If there's a delay even with parallel processing, what should I do?

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: Collide them.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What?

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: Collide them. Don't unequip teleportation, hit it with photon output. And as you hit, equip photon output in the slot.
Flu extended both fists forward.
She struck her left hand with her right, causing the left hand to fly away and the right hand to take its place.

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: This illustrated her earlier explanation.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's how you finish unequipping and equipping simultaneously. It shortens the mechanism.

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: You need to do this in the realm of thought. It's about striking an existing thought with a new one. Mages call this 'Force'.
Flu demonstrated the process again, but this time, she brought her fists close together and quickly collided them, making a 'bang' sound with her mouth.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Do you understand? Skip the unequipping process and just hit it while equipping.

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: If you ever work in the field, you need to know Force. Passive-active linking is used across all series.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Force... I didn't know such a thing existed.

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: Of course not. It's a practical skill. They don't teach it in school.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Is it dangerous?

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: No, but it's less stable. You have to precisely equip the slot while colliding thoughts. It's heavily reliant on intuition, so it's not suitable for regular education.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Parallel processing is also a professional skill. It's impressive that you mastered it on your own.

blocks.speaker: Flu
blocks.content: You'll probably learn Force quickly too.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The key was mastering Force.
